title: gh-151845: Fix formatfloat() return-value contract in unicode_format.c
author: aisk
body:
As mentioned in the issue, this don't affected to callers and users, so /skip-news and don't requires a test.

<!--
Thanks for your contribution!
Please read this comment in its entirety. It's quite important.

# Pull Request title

It should be in the following format:

```
gh-NNNNNN: Summary of the changes made
```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

If this is a backport PR (PR made against branches other than `main`),
please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```
[X.Y] <title from the original PR> (GH-NNNNNN)
```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-151845 -->
* Issue: gh-151845
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: sobolevn
comments.body: Does it need to be backported?

comments.author: aisk
comments.body: This change doesn’t affect Python’s behavior because the caller already handles it. However, I think it would still be better to backport it to avoid potential future conflicts, as long as the backport is conflict-free.

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @aisk for the PR, and @sobolevn for merging it 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.13, 3.14, 3.15.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @aisk and @sobolevn, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.14` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker c2661e6189ab2833bf32fa723cc427e64c026839 3.14
```

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-151865](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/151865) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.15 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.15).

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @aisk and @sobolevn, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.13` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker c2661e6189ab2833bf32fa723cc427e64c026839 3.13
```

comments.author: aisk
comments.body: Hi, since backporting this to 3.13 and 3.14 causes conflicts, I think we should just leave it as is.

comments.author: StanFromIreland
comments.body: @aisk feel free to remove the labels if a backport is unsuitable/not worth it.

comments.author: aisk
comments.body:
> @aisk feel free to remove the labels if a backport is unsuitable/not worth it.

TIL, thanks!
